docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED NOV-06-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SENTACHI, ALAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $657.00 FILED BY BAUM, HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT SENTACHI, ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-15-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAROLD BAUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALAN SENTACHI IS PRESENT. FILING OF PROOF SERVICE ONE DAY SHORT. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ALLOWS THIS CASE TO BE CONTINUED UNTIL THE OUTCOME OF PENDING RENT BOARD HEARINGS: ILLEGAL RENT INCREASE & REDUCTION IN RENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-09-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE; CONTINUED FOR OUTCOME OF RENT BOARD HEARINGS.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
